content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/app.py:1	from flask import Flask, render_request, redirect, url_for, request, render_template2	from database import db3	from models import URL4	import os5	6	app = Flask(__name__)7	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///urls.db'8	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False9	10	db.init_app(app)11	12	with app.app_context():13	    db.create_all()14	15	@app.route('/', methods=['GET', 'POST'])16	def index():17	    if request.method == 'POST':18	        original_url = request.form.get('url')19	        if original_url:20	            url_entry = URL(original_url=original_url)21	            db.session.add(url_entry)22	            db.session.commit()23	            return render_template('index.html', short_url=request.host_url + url_entry.short_code)24	    return render_template('index.html')25	26	@app.route('/<short_code>')27	def redirect_to_url(short_code):28	    url_entry = URL.query.filter_by(short_code=short_code).first_or_404()29	    return redirect(url_entry.original_url)30	31	if __name__ == '__main__':32	    app.run(debug=True)
